title: Square Payment
description: Represents a payment processed by the Square API, including credit cards, gift cards, digital wallets, ACH bank transfers, cash, and external payments.

id.description: A unique ID for the payment.

created_at.description: The timestamp of when the payment was created, in RFC 3339 format.

updated_at.description: The timestamp of when the payment was last updated, in RFC 3339 format.

amount_money.description: The amount processed for this payment, not including tip_money.

tip_money.description: The amount designated as a tip.

total_money.description: The total amount for the payment, including amount_money and tip_money.

app_fee_money.description: The amount the developer is taking as a fee for facilitating the payment on behalf of the seller.

approved_money.description: The amount of money approved for this payment.

effective_at.description: The timestamp of when the fee takes effect.

type.description: The type of fee assessed or adjusted.

processing_fee.description: The processing fees and fee adjustments assessed by Square for this payment.

refunded_money.description: The total amount of the payment refunded to date.

status.description: Indicates whether the payment is APPROVED, PENDING, COMPLETED, CANCELED, or FAILED.

delay_duration.description: The duration of time after the payment's creation when Square automatically applies the delay_action to the payment, in RFC 3339 duration format.

delay_action.description: The action to be applied to the payment when the delay_duration has elapsed. Current values include CANCEL and COMPLETE.

delayed_until.description: The read-only timestamp of when the delay_action is automatically applied, in RFC 3339 format.

source_type.description: The source type for this payment.

card_details.description: Details about a card payment. Only populated if the source_type is CARD.

cash_details.description: Details about a cash payment. Only populated if the source_type is CASH.

buyer_supplied_money.description: The amount of cash provided by the buyer.

change_back_money.description: The amount of change returned to the buyer.

bank_account_details.description: Details about a bank account payment. Only populated if the source_type is BANK_ACCOUNT.

external_details.description: Details about an external payment. Only populated if the source_type is EXTERNAL.

wallet_details.description: Details about a wallet payment. Only populated if the source_type is WALLET.

buy_now_pay_later_details.description: Details about a Buy Now Pay Later payment. Only populated if the source_type is BUY_NOW_PAY_LATER.

square_account_details.description: Details about a Square Account payment. Only populated if the source_type is SQUARE_ACCOUNT.

location_id.description: The ID of the location associated with the payment.

order_id.description: The ID of the order associated with the payment.

reference_id.description: An optional ID that associates the payment with an entity in another system.

customer_id.description: The ID of the customer associated with the payment.

employee_id.description: An optional ID of the employee associated with taking the payment.

team_member_id.description: An optional ID of the TeamMember associated with taking the payment.

refund_ids.description: A list of refund IDs associated with the payment.

risk_evaluation.description: An assessment of the risk associated with the payment.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the risk evaluation was created.

risk_level.description: The risk level associated with the payment.

note.description: An optional note to include when creating a payment.

statement_description_identifier.description: Additional payment information that gets added to the customer's card statement.

receipt_url.description: The URL for the payment's receipt.

version_token.description: Used for optimistic concurrency. This opaque token identifies a specific version of the Payment object.
